sections.sectionTitle: Anpalte leh Sawmah Khat Piakna Zia

verses.text: “ Topa na Pasian un luah dingin a hong piak leitangah va pai-in, tua leitang luahin a tungah na ten' uh ciangin

Topa na Pasian un a hong piak leitang pana piang gah khempeuh panin a gah masa pawlkhat la-in lawh khat sungah na koih ding uh a, ama min na omsakna dingun Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na pai ding uh hi

Tua hun laitakin na a sem siampipa kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in kote piak dingin ka pu ka pate uh tungah a ciam leitangah ka tun' khitna uh tuni-in Topa na Pasian kiangah kong ko uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi
“Tua ciangin siampipa in note' khut panin a lawh hong saang ding a, Topa note' Pasian biakna tau mai-ah koih ding hi

“ Topa note' Pasian mai-ah note in, ‘A vak kawikawi kote' pupi pen Aram mi hi a, amah Egypt-ah paisukin tua munah a peem lai-in mi tawmno ahi hi. Tua lai-ah amah a lian, a thahat, tampi a pha minam khat a suak hi
Egypt-te in kote hong ngong bawlin hong gimsak a, kote sal bangin hong bawl uh hi
Tua ciangin ka pu ka pate uh Pasian ahi Topa Pasian' tungah ka kiko uh a, Topa in kote' aw hong za-in, ka gimnate uh, ka sepnate uh leh hong netniamnate uh a mu hi
Topa in a vangliatna leh a thahatna, launa lianpi, lim leh na lamdangte tawh Egypt panin kote hong paikhiatpih hi
Amah in hih mun hong tun'pihin, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gam hih leitang ko tungah hong pia hi

Tua ahih ciangin en in, Topa, nangmah in kote nong piaksa leitang panin a gah a min masa kong paipih uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah na koihsuk ding uh a, Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah na bia ding uh hi
Topa note' Pasian in note leh na innkuanpihte uh tungah hong piak na a hoih khempeuhte hangin note leh Levi mite leh note lakah a om peemtate na lungdam khawm ding uh hi

“Sawmah khat piak kum ahi, a kum thumna kumin, amaute in na khuapite uh sungah an ne-in, gilvahin a om theihna dingun Levi mite, peemtate, pa neilote, leh meigong numeite tungah na piak uh, na khawhsa uh sawmah khat na piak khit uh ciangin

Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah, ‘Ka innsung panin a siangtho dingteng ka tuamkoih khin hi. Tua thamloin kei nong sawlna bangin na thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in Levi mite, peemtate, pa neilote, leh meigong numeite tungah ka pia khin hi. Hih tungtangah na thupiakna khat zong ka khial kei a, ka mangngilh zong omlo hi

Dahin ka kah sungin zong sawmah khat ka ne kei a, ka nit sungin zong ka khenkhia kei a, misite tungah zong ka pia kei hi. Topa ka Pasian' thu ka mang a, kei nong thupiakna khempeuh bangin ka hih khin hi

Vantung, nangma omna a siangtho panin hong ensuk in la, kote' pulepate tungah bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gam na ciam mah bangin, nangma mi Israel-te leh na hong piaksa leitang thupha hong pia in,’ na ci ding uh hi.

“Tuni-in Topa na Pasian un hih thukhamte leh ngeina kipte na zuih ding uh note tungah thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na hih ding uh limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi
Tuni-in, Topa pen note' Pasian ahihna leh note in ama lampite tawnin, ama thukhamte leh ama thupiaknate leh ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thu na man' ding uh na gen khin uh hi
Tuni-in Topa in note pen amah in note tungah hong ciamsa bangin ama neih ding mi na hihna uh, leh note in ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zuihna ding uh

ama bawlsa minam dangte khempeuh sangin phatna leh minthan'na leh pahtawina a lianzaw a ngahin hong koihna ding, leh ama gensa mah bangin Topa note' Pasian-a' dingin a siangtho mi na hihna ding uh hong gen khin hi,” a ci hi.
